See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 6332 => 'Cebu', 6333 => 'Iloilo', 633461 => 'Negros Occidental', 6335 => 'Negros Oriental', 6336 => 'Antique/Aklan/Capiz', 6338 => 'Bohol', 634235 => 'Quezon', 634244 => 'Quezon', 634251 => 'Quezon', 634264 => 'Quezon', 634279 => 'Quezon', 634396 => 'Batangas', 634422 => 'Bulacan', 634463 => 'Bulacan', 634593 => 'Pampanga', 634594 => 'Pampanga', 634597 => 'Pampanga', 6346 => 'Cavite', 634761 => 'Zambales', 634765 => 'Zambales', 6348 => 'Palawan', 635221 => 'Albay', 6353 => 'Leyte', 635446 => 'Camarines Sur', 6355 => 'Western Samar', 6356 => 'Sorsogon/Masbate', 6362 => 'Zamboanga del Sur', 6363 => 'Lanao del Norte/Lanao del Sur', 636422 => 'North Cotabato', 636423 => 'North Cotabato', 6365 => 'Zamboanga del Norte/Zamboanga del Sur', 6372 => 'La Union', 6374 => 'Abra/Benguet/Kalinga-Apayao/Ifugao/Mountain Province', 6375 => 'Pangasinan', 6377 => 'Ilocos Sur/Ilocos Norte', 6378 => 'Isabela/Quirino/Batanes/Nueva Vizcaya/Cagayan Valley', 6382 => 'Davao del Sur/Davao', 6383 => 'South Cotabato', 6384 => 'Davao del Norte', 6385 => 'Agusan del Sur/Agusan del Norte', 638622 => 'Surigao del Sur', 6387 => 'Davao Oriental', 638822 => 'Misamis Oriental', 638834 => 'Misamis Occidental', 638842 => 'Misamis Oriental', 638851 => 'Bukidnon', 638853 => 'Bukidnon', ];
